p.strong: TDD Spec: cmd1 | cmd2 | cmd3 with SIGPIPE Backpressure

ol.li: Concurrent Start: All children are active at T₂. yes fills pipe faster than head consumes.
Reader Exit: At T₃, head -1 completes. The exit() syscall closes all file descriptors.
The Break: pipe_buffer now has 0 readers but 1 writer (cmd1).
Signal: Next time cmd1 attempts write(), the Kernel trap identifies the broken pipe and delivers SIGPIPE (13).

div.p: The shell only waits for the last process in the pipeline for its return code. However, it must reap all children via waitpid(-1) to prevent zombie processes clogging the kernel process table.
